Commands for working with CircleCI workflows.

Workflows orchestrate a set of jobs within a pipeline. Each pipeline
contains one or more workflows as defined in your config.yml.

Usage:
  workflow [command]

Available Commands:
  cancel      Cancel a running workflow
  completion  Generate the autocompletion script for the specified shell
  get         Get details for a workflow
  help        Help about any command
  list        List workflows for a pipeline
  rerun       Rerun a workflow

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for workflow

Use "workflow [command] --help" for more information about a command.
